_README: ChatGPT Integration -- SuperLocalMemory V3 as ChatGPT Connector
_requires: ChatGPT Pro/Plus/Business/Enterprise with Developer Mode enabled
_tools: search(query) and fetch(id) -- required by OpenAI MCP spec for Connectors

_setup.step3: Copy the HTTPS URL from ngrok (e.g. https://abc123.ngrok.app)
_setup.step4: In ChatGPT: Settings -> Connectors -> Advanced -> Enable Developer Mode
_setup.step5: Create new Connector -> paste URL with /sse/ suffix (e.g. https://abc123.ngrok.app/sse/)
_setup.step7: In any chat, click + -> More -> select SuperLocalMemory connector

_alternative_transport: For Streamable HTTP (recommended): slm serve --transport streamable-http --port 8417
_note: The MCP server and core memory state run locally. A tunnel transmits requested MCP data to ChatGPT; review that data path and any optional integrations before enabling it.
